room.name: by the Factory Service Entrance
room.description: A narrow service corridor with locked bulkhead doors. A faded sign reads 'ELECTRONICS WORKS - STAFF ONLY'. The air smells of solder and oil.

room.name: the Factory Assembly Hall
room.description: Long benches and rails where telescreen boards once moved along conveyor lines. A stack of crates sits against the far wall - one crate is ajar and shows circuit-board boxes within.

room.name: an underground Factory Storage depot.
room.description: Shelves of metal cases, plastic reels of wiring and labelled crates. A locked cabinet hums slightly - Party labels warn staff not to open it.

room.name: the Factory Control Room
room.description: A small raised room overlooking the assembly hall. Prototype telescreens flicker dimly on a rack. A clipboard lies on a desk with a duty rota and a security pass clipped to it.
